allow: Bash(npx -y tsc --jsx react-jsx --module NodeNext --moduleResolution NodeNext --target ES2022 --outDir dist/ui --skipLibCheck --esModuleInterop $b)
Bash(node_modules/.bin/tsc --jsx react-jsx --module NodeNext --moduleResolution NodeNext --target ES2022 --outDir dist/cli --skipLibCheck src/cli/index.tsx)
Bash(node_modules/.bin/tsc --jsx react-jsx --module NodeNext --moduleResolution NodeNext --target ES2022 --outDir dist/ui --skipLibCheck src/ui/App.tsx)
Bash(npx -y tsc --jsx react-jsx --module NodeNext --moduleResolution NodeNext --target ES2022 --outDir dist/ui --skipLibCheck src/ui/App.tsx)
Bash(echo 'E1: Dialog Consistency - src/components/design-system/Dialog.tsx' echo 'E5/@picker - looking for file picker components' find src -name *picker* -o -name *Picker* -o -name *FuzzyPicker*)
Bash(head -20 echo "---" echo "E8/E35 - editor.ts already read" echo "E10 - Welcome banner" grep -rl "welcome\\|Welcome\\|banner\\|Banner" src/components/ --include="*.tsx")

Bash(head -30 echo --- echo 'E20 - MCP server list' echo 'E28 - MCP tool results' echo 'E36 - context command' find src/commands/context/ -type f echo --- echo 'E46 - cursor grapheme' echo 'E47 - vim NFD' echo 'E48 - vim space' echo 'E50 - Ctrl+Z signal' echo 'E65 - Bash memory' echo 'E83 - Claude commit skill' echo 'E86 - Bash URL clickability' echo 'E93/E94 - plan command' find src/commands/plan/ -type f echo --- echo 'E100 - fullscreen blank' find src -name *fullscreen* -o -name *Fullscreen*)
